mappings.notes: No major changes in the procedure for filing FIR.

mappings.crpc_heading: When police may arrest without warrant
mappings.bnss_heading: Power of police to arrest without warrant
mappings.notes: Streamlined provisions for arrest to ensure accountability.

mappings.crpc_heading: In what cases bail to be taken
mappings.notes: Provisions for bail in bailable offences remain largely unchanged.

mappings.crpc_heading: When bail may be taken in case of non-bailable offence
mappings.notes: Enhanced safeguards for granting bail in non-bailable offences.

mappings.crpc_heading: Direction for grant of bail to person apprehending arrest
mappings.notes: Anticipatory bail provisions remain similar with minor procedural updates.

mappings.crpc_heading: Special powers of High Court or Court of Session regarding bail
mappings.bnss_heading: Special powers of High Court or Court of Session regarding bail
mappings.notes: High Court and Sessions Court retain special powers for bail.
Search warrant issuance process remains consistent.

mappings.crpc_heading: Search of place suspected to contain stolen property, forged documents, etc.
mappings.bnss_heading: Search of premises for stolen property or evidence
mappings.notes: Provisions for searching premises for evidence are retained.
Terminology updated to 'unlawfully confined' for clarity.

mappings.crpc_heading: Persons in charge of closed place to allow search
mappings.bnss_heading: Obligation to allow search of premises
mappings.notes: Minor procedural clarifications added.

mappings.crpc_heading: Report of police officer on completion of investigation
mappings.bnss_heading: Police report on completion of investigation
mappings.notes: No significant changes in the reporting process.
Provisions for magistrate's cognizance remain similar.
No major changes in the procedure for examining complainants.
Process issuance provisions remain consistent.

mappings.crpc_heading: Supply to the accused of copy of police report and other documents
mappings.bnss_heading: Supply of police report and documents to accused
mappings.notes: Ensures transparency in providing documents to the accused.

mappings.crpc_heading: Commitment of case to Court of Session when offence is triable exclusively by it
mappings.bnss_heading: Commitment of cases to Sessions Court
mappings.notes: Commitment procedures remain largely unchanged.
Court's power to alter charges is retained.
Provisions for discharge remain similar.
No significant changes in the procedure for framing charges.

mappings.bnss_heading: Discharge of accused in warrant cases
mappings.notes: Provisions for discharge in warrant cases remain consistent.

mappings.bnss_heading: Framing of charges in warrant cases
mappings.notes: Framing of charges in warrant cases remains unchanged.
Summary trial provisions are retained with minor updates.

mappings.crpc_heading: Person once convicted or acquitted not to be tried for same offence
mappings.notes: Double jeopardy protection remains intact.
No major changes in the examination process.
Compounding provisions remain consistent.
Provisions for withdrawal from prosecution remain unchanged.

mappings.crpc_heading: Procedure when Magistrate cannot pass sentence sufficiently severe
mappings.notes: No significant changes in the procedure.
Judgment pronouncement provisions remain consistent.
Appeal provisions are retained with minor updates.

mappings.crpc_heading: Calling for records to exercise powers of revision
mappings.notes: Revision powers remain similar with procedural updates.
Sessions Judge's revision powers are retained.
High Court's revision powers remain consistent.
Provisions for anticipatory bail remain unchanged.

mappings.crpc_heading: Saving of inherent powers of High Court
mappings.notes: High Court's inherent powers are preserved.

mappings.crpc_heading: Order for maintenance of wives, children and parents
mappings.notes: Provisions for maintenance are retained with minor updates.

mappings.crpc_heading: Police officer's power to investigate cognizable case
mappings.notes: Investigation powers of police remain consistent.
Witness examination provisions remain unchanged.

mappings.crpc_heading: Statements to police not to be signed: Use of statements in evidence
mappings.bnss_heading: Use of police statements in evidence
mappings.notes: Provisions for police statements remain consistent.
No major changes in the procedure for recording confessions.

mappings.crpc_heading: Procedure when investigation cannot be completed in twenty-four hours
mappings.notes: Provisions for extended investigation remain similar.
